description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits a broadly ovate shape with a serrated margin. Surface texture appears slightly rugose, potentially due to minor distortions or early symptom development. Venation is pinnate, visible but not prominently raised."} {"description": "Small, circular to irregular chlorotic spots are present. Some spots exhibit a reddish-brown center, suggesting potential necrosis. Lesions are generally discrete, but some appear to be coalescing in localized areas. There is evidence of slight chlorosis around some lesions."} Lesions are primarily concentrated along the leaf margins and veins, with a scattered distribution across the leaf blade. The highest concentration of lesions is observed on the lower portion of the leaf. Distribution appears somewhat systemic, rather than strictly localized.
